message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
title Find all a vaccination documents in EPD

hide footbox
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam sequence {
  ArrowColor #000000
  LifeLineBorderColor #666666
  LifeLineBackgroundColor #FFFFFF
  ParticipantBorderColor #000000
  ParticipantBackgroundColor #FFFFFF
  BoxBorderColor #999999
  BoxBackgroundColor #E6E6E6
  ActorBorderColor #000000
  ActorBackgroundColor #FFFFFF
}

actor HCP as HCP

box "Community A" #E6E6E6
participant "GFPP/PIS" as GFPP_A #00CC00
participant "Aggregator" as AGG_A #00CC00
participant "CO-Registry" as COREG_A #00CC00
participant "CO-Repository" as COREP_A #00CC00
participant "CO-IGW" as COIGW_A #00CC00
end box

box "Community X" #E6E6E6
participant "OC-RGW" as OCRGW_X #33AADD
participant "OC-Registry" as OCREG_X #33AADD
participant "OC-Repository" as OCREP_X #33AADD
end box

HCP -> GFPP_A : [01] Get all immunization data
activate GFPP_A

GFPP_A -> GFPP_A : [02] query all registries

GFPP_A -> COIGW_A : [03] Registry Stored Query Request [ITI-18]
activate COIGW_A

COIGW_A -> COREG_A : [04] Registry Stored Query Request [ITI-18]
activate COREG_A
COREG_A -> COREG_A : [05] Lookup Data
COREG_A --> COIGW_A : [06] Registry Stored Query Response [ITI-18]
deactivate COREG_A

COIGW_A -> COIGW_A : [07] request all communities

COIGW_A -> OCRGW_X : [08] Registry Stored Query Request [ITI-38]
activate OCRGW_X
OCRGW_X -> OCREG_X : [09] Registry Stored Query Request [ITI-18]
activate OCREG_X
OCREG_X -> OCREG_X : [10] Lookup Data
OCREG_X --> OCRGW_X : [11] Registry Stored Query Response [ITI-18]
deactivate OCREG_X
OCRGW_X --> COIGW_A : [12] Registry Stored Query Response [ITI-38]
deactivate OCRGW_X

COIGW_A -> COIGW_A : [13] end loop
COIGW_A -> COIGW_A : [14] Assemble Query Responses

COIGW_A --> GFPP_A : [15] Registry Stored Query Response [ITI-18]
deactivate COIGW_A

GFPP_A -> GFPP_A : [16] list of document info
GFPP_A -> GFPP_A : [17] retrieve all documents

GFPP_A -> COIGW_A : [18] Retrieve Document Request [ITI-43]
activate COIGW_A

COIGW_A -> COREP_A : [19] Retrieve Document Request [ITI-43]
activate COREP_A
COREP_A -> COREP_A : [20] allocate document data
COREP_A --> COIGW_A : [21] Retrieve Document Response [ITI-43]
deactivate COREP_A

COIGW_A -> OCRGW_X : [22] Retrieve Document Request [ITI-39]
activate OCRGW_X
OCRGW_X -> OCREP_X : [23] Retrieve Document Request [ITI-43]
activate OCREP_X
OCREP_X -> OCREP_X : [24] allocate document data
OCREP_X --> OCRGW_X : [25] Retrieve Document Response [ITI-43]
deactivate OCREP_X
OCRGW_X --> COIGW_A : [26] Retrieve Document Response [ITI-39]
deactivate OCRGW_X

COIGW_A -> COIGW_A : [27] Assemble Retrieve Responses

COIGW_A --> GFPP_A : [28] Retrieve Document Response [ITI-43]
deactivate COIGW_A

GFPP_A -> GFPP_A : [29] Aggregate documents
GFPP_A -> GFPP_A : [30] one FHIR ch-vacd document

HCP <-- GFPP_A : [31] Show immunization data
deactivate GFPP_A

@enduml
```
